events.Title: Harbour Lights Night Market
events.Summary: An evening market with local food, craft stalls, and live jazz.
events.Description: Browse independent makers, snack at harbour-side food stands, and stay for an outdoor jazz set after sunset.
events.VenueNote: Covered indoor-outdoor market hall with plenty of room to wander and snack between sets.
events.FeaturedBlurb: Go for the easy social energy, the food lineups, and the kind of event that turns into a low-effort group plan.

events.Title: Design Systems Field Day
events.Summary: A two-day workshop on documentation, component audits, and accessibility reviews.
events.Description: Small-team sessions on component inventory, naming conventions, content patterns, and documentation debt remediation.
events.VenueNote: A bright former industrial space with breakout rooms and long shared tables.
events.FeaturedBlurb: This is for people who want useful notes, sharper thinking, and the right kind of post-session conversations.
events.CrowdLabel: Best solo or with one teammate

events.Title: Riverfront Cleanup Rally
events.Summary: Volunteer-led cleanup with loaner gloves, coffee, and route captains.
events.Description: Meet at the south gate, collect supplies, and move in teams along the riverfront trail before lunch.
events.VenueNote: Meet at the volunteer tent for gloves, route maps, and coffee before heading out.
events.FeaturedBlurb: Worth forwarding when your group wants a clear plan, a useful morning, and low friction.

events.Title: Autumn Venue Crawl
events.Summary: Draft route for venue managers comparing neighborhood spaces.
events.Description: Internal draft itinerary used to compare capacity, transit access, and accessibility notes across partner venues.
events.FeaturedBlurb: Draft internal walk-through for comparing room feel, logistics, and accessibility.

events.Title: Last Season Recap Gala
events.Summary: Archived gala page kept reachable for direct links and retrospectives.
events.Description: An archived page preserving the event record and venue notes after the live season wrapped.
events.VenueNote: Formal seated room used for end-of-season speeches, donor tables, and live music.
events.FeaturedBlurb: Archived so direct links and sponsor recaps still have a stable home.
